articles.title: JetBlue has raised checked bag fees. See how much you’ll pay.
articles.description:
"While we recognize that fee increases are never ideal, we take careful consideration to ensure these changes are implemented only when necessary."

The post JetBlue has raised checked bag fees. See how much you’ll pay. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: JetBlue increased checked bag fees for Boston travelers effective immediately.
Fees now start at $35 for the first checked bag.
Local residents may face higher travel costs during peak travel seasons.

articles.title: Tiger Woods had hydrocodone pills in his pocket and bloodshot eyes at crash scene, authorities say
articles.description:
After taking a Breathalyzer test that showed no signs of alcohol, Woods refused a urine test, authorities say.

The post Tiger Woods had hydrocodone pills in his pocket and bloodshot eyes at crash scene, authorities say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities found hydrocodone pills in Tiger Woods' pocket at the crash scene.
Woods had bloodshot eyes but passed a Breathalyzer test for alcohol.
His refusal of a urine test raises concerns about substance use in Boston.
